documentation.description:
.. note:: This unit is internal: only Langkit and Langkit-generated
libraries are supposed to use it.

simple_types.name: Default_Value_Kind
simple_types.code:
type Default_Value_Kind is
  (None,
   Boolean_Value,
   Integer_Value,
   Character_Value,
   Enum_Value,
   Null_Node_Value);

record_types.name: Argument_Descriptor

fields.name: Name
fields.description: Name for this property argument in camel-with-underscores convention

fields.name: Argument_Type
fields.description: Expected type for this property argument

fields.name: Default_Value
fields.description: Default value for this argument

record_types.name: Array_Type_Descriptor

fields.name: Element_Type
fields.description: Type of elements in this array type

record_types.name: Builtin_Types_Record

documentation.description:
Type indexes of builtin types, for which ``Langkit_Support`` provides
common polymorphic values implementation code (see
``Langkit_Support.Internal.Introspection.Internal_Value``).

record_types.name: Default_Value_Descriptor
Enum_Type_Descriptor

fields.name: Name
fields.description: Name for this enumeration type in camel-with-underscores convention

fields.name: Default_Value
fields.description:
If this enum type has a default value, this contains its index. Zero
otherwise.

fields.name: Value_Names
fields.description: Names for each available value for this enum type

record_types.name: Grammar_Rule_Descriptor

fields.name: Name
fields.description: Name of this grammar rule

fields.name: Is_Public
fields.description: Whether this grammar rule is public

fields.name: Doc
fields.description: Documentation for this grammar rule

fields.name: Return_Type
fields.description: Type for the nodes that this grammar rule creates

record_types.name: Struct_Member_Descriptor

fields.name: Name
fields.description: Name for this struct member in camel-with-underscores convention

fields.name: Owner
fields.description: Type that owns this member

fields.name: Member_Type
fields.description:
Field type (for struct fields or node syntax fields) or return type
(for properties).

fields.name: Null_For
fields.description:
This component is null for all members that are not syntax fields or
for syntax fields that are never defined as "null" for a node.

For others, this component points to an array that maps all node
types that have this member to whether this member is defined as
"null" for that node type.

fields.name: Indexes
fields.description:
This compoment is null for all members that are not syntax fields.

For others, this component points to an array that maps all node
types that have this member to the 1-based index of this member in
that node, or 0 if the syntax field is null or abstract for this
node.

fields.name: Arguments
fields.description:
Descriptors for each argument of this property. Empty array for
fields.

record_types.name: Struct_Type_Descriptor

fields.name: Base_Type
fields.description: Reference to the struct type from which this derives

fields.name: Is_Abstract
fields.description: Whether this struct type is abstract

fields.name: Is_Error_Node
fields.description: Whether this is an error node

fields.name: Is_Synthetic
fields.description: Whether this struct type is synthetic

fields.name: Is_Token_Node
fields.description: Whether this is a token node

fields.name: Token_Node_Kind
fields.description:
If this is a token node and unparsers are enabled for this language,
token kind corresponding to this token node. ``No_Token_Kind_Index``
otherwise.

fields.name: List_Element_Type
fields.description:
If this is a list node, reference to its element type.
``No_Type_Index`` otherwise.

fields.name: Name
fields.description: Name for this type in camel-with-underscores convention

fields.name: Repr_Name
fields.description:
"Representation" name (i.e. name used in text dumps) for this type.
Null for all but node types.

fields.name: Inherited_Members
fields.description: Number of inherited members for this struct (``Members`` included)

fields.name: Derivations
fields.description:
Sorted list (by index) of all struct types that directly derives from
this struct.

fields.name: Members
fields.description: List of members for this struct ,excluding inherited members

record_types.name: Type_Descriptor

fields.name: Category
fields.description: Category for this type

fields.name: Debug_Name
fields.description: Free-form name of this type for debug purposes

Reference count for this record. When it drops to zero, the
``Destroy`` primitive must be called.

subprograms.name: Array_Item

documentation.description:
Return the array item in ``Value`` at the given ``Index``. The index is
assumed to be in-bounds.
Return the number of items in the ``Value`` array

Free resources allocated for this value. Derivations can omit the
overriding if there is nothing to free manually.

subprograms.name: Eval_Member

documentation.description:
Return the struct member in ``Value`` corresponding to the given
``Member`` index. The index is assumed to be valid for this struct.

Return a string that represents ``Value``, for logging/debugging
purposes.

Consume and return the next item in the ``Value`` iterator, if there is
one, otherwise return null.

subprograms.name: Type_Matches
subprograms.code:
function Type_Matches
  (Value : Internal_Rec_Node; T : Type_Index) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Type_Matches
subprograms.code:
function Type_Matches
  (Value : Internal_Value; T : Type_Index) return Boolean

documentation.description:
Return whether ``Value`` is a valid value to be passed as a ``T``
argument.

By default, we check that ``Type_Of (Value) = T``, but derivations can
override this behavior, which use useful for instance for nodes
subtyping.
Return the type of the ``Value`` polymorphic value
Return the index of the given enum value

generic_instantiations.name: Free
generic_instantiations.code:
procedure Free is new Ada.Unchecked_Deallocation
  (Internal_Value'Class, Internal_Value_Access);
